heading: Licensure and certification tests
label: 3315 Licensure and certification tests
notes: Amendments2017—Subsec. (c). , in introductory provisions, substituted “shall be pro-rated based on the actual amount of the fee charged for the test relative to the rate for 1 month payable” for “shall be determined at the rate of one month (rounded to the nearest whole month) for each amount paid that equals”.Pub. L. 115–482011—Subsec. (a). , substituted “licensing or certification tests” for “one licensing or certification test”.Pub. L. 111–377, § 107(a)Subsec. (b)(3). , added par. (3).Pub. children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: An individual entitled to educational assistance under this chapter shall also be entitled to payment for licensing or certification tests described in section 3452(b).
the fee charged for the test; or
the amount of entitlement available to the individual under this chapter at the time of payment for the test under this section.
for the academic year beginning on , $1,460; orAugust 1, 2011

for an academic year beginning on any subsequent August 1, the amount for the previous academic year beginning on August 1 under this subsection, as increased by the percentage increase equal to the most recent percentage increase determined under section 3015(h).
